name: Roar Rampage
author: Poki
description: Roar Rampage is an action game where you become a furious dinosaur on a mission to destroy everything in sight! Smash buildings with powerful punches, block incoming bullets, and stay fierce even when helicopters attack from above. Wreak havoc, unleash your rage, and leave the city in ruins! Are you ready to roar and rampage? How to play Roar Rampage? Click or tap to hit. Who created Roar Rampage? Roar Rampage is created by Neutronized. Play their other game on Poki: Slime Laboratory , Slime Laboratory 2 , Snow Tale , Picnic Penguin , Magic Bridge , Lost Yeti , Yokai Dungeon , Mimelet , Drop Wizard Tower , Dyna Boy , Shadow Trick , Double Panda and Slime Pizza ! How can I play Roar Rampage for free? You can play Roar Rampage for free on Poki. Can I play Roar Rampage on mobile devices and desktop? Roar Rampage can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
